title: Las Vegas Sands 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary source for operations, segment structure, property scale, competition, 2025 revenue, net income, and adjusted property EBITDA.

title: Las Vegas Sands Our Properties
note: Official property descriptions and capacity figures for The Venetian Macao and Marina Bay Sands.

title: Marina Bay Sands Homepage
note: Official customer-facing page for Marina Bay Sands' hotel, dining, shopping, attractions, entertainment, and loyalty positioning.

title: The Venetian Macao Homepage
note: Official customer-facing page for The Venetian Macao's hotel, dining, shopping, entertainment, and event offerings.

title: Las Vegas Sands Our Planet
note: Company sustainability page documenting Sands ECO360, energy efficiency, renewable energy, water, waste, and responsible sourcing priorities.

title: Las Vegas Sands Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for June 2026 market capitalization snapshot.

title: Las Vegas Sands P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for June 2026 trailing P/E ratio snapshot.

title: QloApps Free and Open Source Hotel Management System
note: Open-source hospitality software source for PMS, booking engine, hotel website, channel manager, and direct-booking functionality.

title: Qloapps/QloApps GitHub Repository
note: Repository source for QloApps license, public codebase, release activity, and project description.

title: HotelDruid Hotel Management Software
note: Open-source property-management software source for hotel reservations, room assignment, POS, statistics, and AGPL licensing.

title: OpenTravel Developers Network
note: Technical source for OpenTravel publications, artifacts, implementer support, and travel-industry message specifications.

title: OpenEMS Open Energy Management System
note: Open-source energy management source for distributed energy, storage, grid interaction, and open EMS coordination concepts.
